title: Configure a graph for code execution
content:
- #+BEGIN_TIP
- ### Configure Code Execution for a graph
- #### config.edn
  - go to Settings and click config.edn button
  - Include the following code in the macro section -- between the {} brackets
  - ``` edn
- #### custom.css
  - go to Settings and click custom.css button
  - Add the following css (making sure no button settings are already in your custom.css)
  - ```css
- #### custom .js
  - create this file and place it in the *logseq* folder of your graph
  - ```javascript
